message:
fix(handoff): make ClearMail continue on partial failure

ClearMail now processes all pinned messages even if some fail, returning
partial results with collected errors. Previously, a single failure
mid-loop would stop processing, leaving remaining messages uncleared
with no indication of which succeeded.

Fixes: gt-mvhssj.5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
